title: Limonium tineoi
taxonomy: Limonium tineoi is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It belongs to the genus Limonium, which comprises about 200 species of coastal and salt-tolerant plants. The Plumbaginaceae family, also known as the leadwort or sea lavender family, is an order of flowering plants that consists of about 50 genera. Limonium tineoi is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in dry, rocky areas. This classification is based on the plant's botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
